cover.subtitle:
긴급조치 7년,
10·26으로 막을 내리다.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a tall granite government building facade with closed shutters and a single chained door (suggesting the suspended constitution). FOREGROUND silhouettes: a row of riot police helmets seen from behind. Sky: heavy gray with a single crimson torn flag fragment fluttering. Color palette: cold steel-gray + black + crimson accent. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 7차 개헌의 특징(6년·중임 제한 철폐·1/3 임명·국회해산권), 통일주체국민회의의 역할, 3·1 민주구국선언과 부마항쟁의 시기 구분이 핵심.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a silhouette of a closed government building with a single chain across the door (no readable text). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
